name: timescale_mixture_exp011
hypothesis: Phase-2 mechanism variant: the .mean collapse over the 4 braided decay timescales (gdn3_upgrade.py:822) mashes distinct retention rates into one averaged factor, removing the selective long-range channel a key->value binding needs to survive 512 tokens. A learned per-timescale softmax mixture (tau_gate, zero-init so warm-start is unperturbed) lets the model route content to different retention rates and preserve a slow long-range channel — should break the ~0.30 format plateau toward true retrieval.
